what_it_does: This file stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for an image attachment tied to the design-source channel, pointing to an image asset for a recent pitch.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-3c95e12a, channel design-source, and attachment_type images.
The target field uses a custom URI image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-32.
An ISO 8601 timestamp added: 2026-06-22T11:31:02.699284+00:00 is present.
standouts: The custom image:// URI target pointing to recent-pitches/p-32.
The attachment is typed as images with no embedded image data.
The precise UTC timestamp suggests an audit or append-only ledger.
conventions: Follows the channel-memory attachment file naming pattern att-<id>.md.
Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Uses a URI-scheme target to reference an external asset rather than inlining it.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
concerns: The file provides no alt text, dimensions, MIME type, or checksum for the image.
The target URI cannot be resolved or validated from the contents of this file alone.
There is no author or provenance information for the attachment.
notes: A minimal, timestamped metadata stub that registers an image attachment against a design-source pitch.
questions: What image content does p-32 actually contain?
Who added this attachment and why?
Are there other attachments referencing the same target image?
What is the expected resolution or validation behavior for an image:// URI?
intention_signals: It appears to register an image asset as an attachment to a design pitch in a channel memory ledger, keeping the ledger file small while linking to the actual binary asset.
novelty: It uses a custom image:// URI scheme to target a pitch-specific asset path rather than a filesystem or HTTP URL.
contribution: It contributes a typed, timestamped pointer that connects a channel memory entry to an external image asset, supporting attachment discovery and traceability without embedding binary data.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-3c95e12a for the design-source channel, typed as images, targeting image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-32 and timestamped 2026-06-22T11:31:02Z.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to catalog an image attachment associated with a recent design-source pitch.
